# Markdown Memory Update Protocol

## Purpose

Every campaign should improve the repo's working intelligence.

## Memory files

| File | Update when |
|---|---|
| `memory/product_facts.md` | A feature, limitation, offer, pricing detail, integration, or proof point changes |
| `memory/buyer_language.md` | New real buyer phrasing is discovered |
| `memory/research_findings.md` | New market, competitor, review, or source insight is extracted |
| `memory/creative_variants.md` | New ad variants are generated or tested |
| `memory/tactic_performance.md` | A tactic wins, loses, or has inconclusive results |
| `memory/experiment_memory.md` | Any campaign is launched, changed, paused, or interpreted |
| `memory/platform_payloads.md` | A platform-ready packet is produced |
| `memory/offer_tests.md` | Pricing, trial, lead magnet, bonus, guarantee, or packaging is tested |

## Update format

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD - [brief title]

- Source / campaign:
- What changed:
- Evidence:
- Confidence:
- Should affect future campaigns? Yes/No
- Follow-up:
```

## Rule

If the agent cannot say what memory changed, the run did not compound.
